message:
Fix redundant stderr redirection in ntm_is_available

Remove unnecessary 2>&1 since &>/dev/null already redirects both
stdout and stderr.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4835,7 +4835,7 @@ ntm_is_available() {
         return 1
     fi
     # Verify ntm responds to status query
-    if ! ntm --robot-status &>/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    if ! ntm --robot-status &>/dev/null; then
         return 1
     fi
     return 0
